name: Mara Vale
summary: Independent investigator who uncovers the turbine safety scandal.
description: Mara is methodical, isolated, and increasingly alarmed as she realizes the published reports do not match the coastal damage.
publicNotes: Stubborn outsider with a reputation for thorough reporting.
hiddenNotes: Stored a duplicate evidence packet in a dead-drop locker and planned to hand the material to Jonah and a regulator.

name: Elena Voss
summary: Executive who learns the files were copied and helps coordinate the cover-up.
description: Elena frames herself as protecting the town's economy while quietly authorizing the deletion and replacement of records.
publicNotes: Polished corporate leader focused on stability and jobs.
hiddenNotes: Did not order murder, but made the concealment possible once the confrontation went wrong.

name: Deputy Soren Pike
summary: Local law officer who obstructs outside scrutiny and helps bury the aftermath.
description: Pike is the pressure point between municipal authority and Blackwake's interests. He flags Mara's access requests, arrives at the scene, and later files the case as a disappearance.
publicNotes: Practical, tired, and always close to official paperwork.
hiddenNotes: Previously helped remove an earlier safety complaint from the intake flow.

name: Tomas Reed
summary: The man who arranges the final meeting and later helps move evidence.
description: Tomas is loyal to the harbor and exposed to the consequences of Blackwake collapsing, which makes him easy to pressure and easy to compromise.
publicNotes: A tired civic caretaker who keeps the port functioning.
hiddenNotes: He lies about his route that night and debates calling for help after the fall.

name: Jonah Quill
summary: Reporter who receives part of Mara's package and helps establish the timeline.
description: Jonah is one of the few people Mara trusts enough to brief before publication. He is useful because he can connect the paper trail to public scrutiny.
publicNotes: A persistent nuisance to the town's officials.
hiddenNotes: He only receives a partial encrypted package after Mara disappears.

name: Iris Fen
summary: Witness with an incomplete statement and a fear of retaliation.
description: Iris heard the argument near the cliff path and later tries to correct the record, but the official archive copy has already been sanitized.
publicNotes: Unreliable witness in the eyes of the town.
hiddenNotes: The original statement mentioned two male voices; the archive copy removed one of them.

name: Blackwake Energy
summary: The company behind the plant, the safety reports, and the political pressure to keep the case quiet.
description: Blackwake depends on the turbine project for the town's economy and uses that leverage to suppress complaints and redirect scrutiny.
hiddenNotes: The company's records show two incompatible inspection reports and a deleted access log entry.

name: Turbine 3
summary: The unit with the hidden vibration fault and the strongest forensic trail.
description: Turbine 3 is where the safety flaw was suppressed, making it the technical center of the scandal rather than just a background prop.
publicNotes: One unit in the tidal array.
hiddenNotes: The dangerous version of the inspection report warns that the fault could cause a catastrophic mechanical failure near the harbor channel.
